artifact_summary: Screenshot of a SCADA system showing an Analog Tag Faceplate for a level transmitter with a vertical bar graph, engineering units, and alarm thresholds.
artifact_blurb: A detailed screenshot of a Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) interface displaying an Analog Tag Faceplate configured for a level transmitter. The visualization includes a vertical bar graph representing real-time process variables in engineering units, flanked by configurable high and low alarm thresholds.

The visualization includes a vertical bar graph representing real-time process variables in engineering units, flanked by configurable high and low alarm thresholds.
